Get Started
Claude for SaaS

Ship Features Faster, Close More Deals,
Retain Better.

SaaS teams are drowning in content production, manual sequences, and repetitive customer communication. Claude handles the operational output so your team can focus on the product.

Get Claude Implemented → How It Works
The SaaS operations problem

Your product moves fast.
Your operations aren't keeping up.

📧
Manual sales sequences
Your reps write every follow-up by hand. There's no repeatable system — just whoever has time to type.
✍️
Content production too slow
Release notes, blog posts, case studies, help docs — every piece gets queued, delayed, or never written at all.
🎧
Customer success bottlenecks
CSMs spend half their time on status updates, QBR prep, and check-in emails instead of actual relationship work.
📚
Onboarding docs always outdated
The product ships. The docs don't update. New customers get onboarding materials that don't match what they see.
What Claude handles

Six high-leverage Claude workflows
for SaaS teams.

01
Sales Email Sequences
Personalized outreach and follow-up sequences built from your ICP, positioning, and deal stage — drafted by Claude, refined by your team, sent at volume.
02
Product Release Notes
Feed Claude your changelog and it writes customer-facing release notes, internal announcements, and social posts — consistent every sprint.
03
Customer Onboarding Flows
Onboarding email sequences, in-app guidance copy, and help documentation — drafted and updated by Claude as the product evolves.
04
Churn Risk Summaries
Claude synthesizes account notes, usage signals, and CSM observations into structured churn risk summaries your team can actually act on.
05
Support Ticket Triage
Claude drafts first-pass responses to support tickets by category, pulling from your knowledge base — your team edits and sends instead of writing from scratch.
06
Competitor Battlecards
Structured battlecards your reps will actually use — built from competitive intel and kept current as the market shifts.
How it works

Audit. Build. Optimize.

Three steps from scattered manual work to Claude running your content and communication ops.

1
AI Audit — $1,500
We map your highest-friction workflows across sales, CS, and content. You get a prioritized implementation plan with specific Claude use cases for your SaaS stack. Learn about the Audit →
2
Implementation — from $3,500
We build the Claude workflows, Projects, and prompts your team will actually use. Integrated with your existing tools — not a parallel system nobody touches. See Implementation details →
3
Retainer — $1,200/mo
Ongoing optimization as your product, team, and market evolve. New workflows added, existing ones refined. Claude keeps up with your growth. Retainer details →
Start with an AI Audit → Claude for Small Business →
Common use cases

What SaaS teams use Claude for.

Sales Sequences Release Notes Onboarding Emails Churn Risk Summaries Support Responses Battlecards QBR Prep Help Documentation Case Studies Product Announcements
